search.query: |inputlookup $field1$ |eval timenow=now() |rex field=bucket "db_(?<epoch_end>.+?)_" |eval nowstring=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%d") |eval bucketage=timenow-epoch_end | eval years = round(bucketage/31540000,0) | eval months = round(bucketage/2628000,0) | eval weeks = round(bucketage/604800,0) | eval days = round(bucketage/86400,0) | eval hours = round(bucketage/3600,0) |table bucket hours days weeks months years |stats count

|inputlookup $field1$ |eval timenow=now() |rex field=bucket "db_(?<epoch_end>.+?)_" |eval nowstring=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%d") |eval bucketage=timenow-epoch_end | eval years = round(bucketage/31540000,0) | eval months = round(bucketage/2628000,0) | eval weeks = round(bucketage/604800,0) | eval days = round(bucketage/86400,0) | eval hours = round(bucketage/3600,0) |search days>10 |table bucket hours days weeks months years |stats count

|inputlookup $field1$ |eval timenow=now() |rex field=bucket "db_(?<epoch_end>.+?)_" |eval nowstring=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%d") |eval bucketage=timenow-epoch_end | eval years = round(bucketage/31540000,0) | eval months = round(bucketage/2628000,0) | eval weeks = round(bucketage/604800,0) | eval days = round(bucketage/86400,0) | eval hours = round(bucketage/3600,0) |search days>10 |table bucket hours days weeks months years

|inputlookup $field1$ |eval timenow=now() |rex field=bucket "db_(?<epoch_end>.+?)_" |eval nowstring=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%d") |eval bucketage=timenow-epoch_end | eval years = round(bucketage/31540000,0) | eval months = round(bucketage/2628000,0) | eval weeks = round(bucketage/604800,0) | eval days = round(bucketage/86400,0) | eval hours = round(bucketage/3600,0) |table bucket hours days weeks months years

|inputlookup $field1$ |rex field=bucket "db_(?<epoch_end>.+?)_" |rex field=bucket "db_\S+\_(?<epoch_start>.+?)_" |eval epoend=strftime(epoch_end, "%Y-%m-%d") |eval epostart=strftime(epoch_start, "%Y-%m-%d") |eval instart="$field2$" |eval inend="$field3$" | eval instart = strptime('instart', "%Y-%m-%d") | eval instart=round(instart,0) | eval inend = strptime('inend', "%Y-%m-%d") | eval inend =round(inend,0) | eval diff1=epoch_end-instart | eval diff2=inend-epoch_start | search diff1>=0 diff2>=0 |table bucket epoch_end epoend end epoch_start epostart start instart inend diff1 diff2
